# Carlos Arias

Personal website of Carlos Arias, Senior Director of Product Management at Precisely.

## About
Product management leader with 18+ years in technology innovation, AI/ML product strategy, and digital transformation.

## Pages
- / — Home
- /experience — Career history
- /accomplishments — Key achievements
- /education — Degrees and certifications
- /boards — Board memberships
- /about — Biography and philosophy
- /books — Reading list
- /contact — Contact links
